Off Calendar May-05-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2022 Continued To May-25-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-23-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances
Scott Montgomery, Esq., Abbey, Weitzenberg, Warren & emery, P.C., (707)542-5050, smontgomery@abbeylaw.com for Plaintiff Matthew Vann,
KATHERINE B. BEARMAN, Esq.,Deputy City Attorney, (415) 554-4256 kate.bearman@sfcityatty.org for Defendants CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and LOUIE RUI YU. via Zoom Conference

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LOUIE YU DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Defendants Louie Yu and the City and County of San Francisco's (the City) demurrer to the complaint is sustained without leave to amend.

Matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com mailto:maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)

*AFTER HEARIING, AN ORDER SUSTAINING DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND LOUIE RUI YU'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF MATTHEW VANN'S COMPLAINT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND IS SIGNED.
